_comment_purpose: databricks_load/jobs/healthcare_etl_job.json
PURPOSE:
Databricks Jobs API v2.1 job definition for the Healthcare ETL Pipeline.
Import via: databricks jobs import-from-file healthcare_etl_job.json
Or create manually in Databricks UI → Workflows → Create Job.
Stored in terraform.tfvars as databricks_job_id_etl.
Referenced by Lambda databricks-trigger-prod to start the job via API.
TRIGGER:
Primary:  SNS batch_complete → Lambda databricks-trigger → Jobs API run-now
Fallback: Daily cron at 6:00 AM UTC (catches missed SNS notifications)
quartz_cron_expression: '0 0 6 * * ?'
TASK DAG (sequential — each task depends on the previous):
1. Run_Glue_Crawler             (00_run_glue_crawler)
→ Runs the Glue Crawler before Auto Loader so schema hints are fresh.
→ timeout_seconds: 1800 (crawler can take up to 30 min on large prefixes)
→ max_retries: 1 (if crawler fails, retry once before failing the job)
2. Bronze_Ingestion_Workflow    (01_bronze_ingestion)
→ Auto Loader reads bronze/sftp/ → writes to bronze.stg_staffing Delta
→ availableNow trigger: processes all new files then stops (not continuous)
→ timeout_seconds: 1800
→ max_retries: 2 (transient S3 errors are retryable)
→ retry_on_timeout: true
3. Silver_Transformation_Workflow (02_silver_transformation)
→ Watermark filter → dedup → DQ flags → MERGE upsert to silver.staffing_standardized
→ timeout_seconds: 3600 (large initial loads can take up to 1 hour)
→ max_retries: 2
4. Gold_Analytics_Workflow      (03_gold_unified_analytics)
→ fact_staffing, fact_overtime, dim_facility SCD2, fact_census_realtime
→ Dedup Silver source before MERGE to prevent DELTA_MULTIPLE_SOURCE_ROW error
→ timeout_seconds: 3600
→ max_retries: 1 (Gold failures should be investigated, not auto-retried)
5. ML_Feature_Pipeline          (04_ml_feature_pipeline)
→ 7-day rolling windows → overtime_features → overwrite ml_ready
→ timeout_seconds: 3600
→ max_retries: 1
COMPUTE:
Serverless compute (no cluster configuration needed).
Databricks Serverless automatically provisions and tears down compute.
Faster cold start than classic clusters; billed per DBU consumed.
FAILURE NOTIFICATION:
email_notifications.on_failure → ops_alerts SNS topic (via email subscriber)
Lambda databricks-trigger also publishes to ops_alerts SNS when job status = FAILED
MAX CONCURRENT RUNS = 1:
Prevents two ETL runs from executing simultaneously.
If a new SNS batch_complete fires while an ETL run is already in progress,
the trigger Lambda detects the active run and skips starting a new one.
NOTE: This file is a documentation scaffold only.
The actual job definition includes notebook_path references to your workspace.
Update notebook paths to match your workspace: /Shared/healthcare/pipelines/...
